title: Reader Core Event Protocol
description: JSON message protocol for Core → platform events.

requestId.description: Original positive Core command requestId that produced this result.
Original command requestId, or 0 for process-level errors emitted outside a host command.
Original Core command requestId that is blocked on this host operation.

HostCapability.description: Closed set of host-owned capabilities Core may request. Platforms only execute these capabilities and must not interpret Legado business rules.

HostWebViewEvaluateJavaScriptRequest.description: Request params for webview.evaluateJavaScript. Core supplies document input and JavaScript; the host only evaluates the script in a platform WebView.

timeoutMillis.description: Optional execution timeout requested by Core.

HostFileReadRequest.description: Request params for file.read. Core supplies an opaque path and byte bounds; hosts only read bytes/content.

HostFileWriteRequest.description: Request params for file.write. Core supplies the destination path and bytes/content.

HostCacheGetRequest.description: Request params for cache.get. Namespace and key are Core-owned opaque identifiers.

HostCachePutRequest.description: Request params for cache.put. Core supplies opaque namespace/key and bytes/content to store.

HostCookieGetRequest.description: Request params for cookie.get. Core supplies lookup scope; host only returns cookie records.

HostCookieSetRequest.description: Request params for cookie.set. Core supplies a cookie record; host only stores it for the scoped jar.

HostLogEmitRequest.description: Request params for log.emit. Core supplies structured log facts; host only emits them.

HostTimeNowRequest.description: Request params for time.now. Core may request an optional clock/timezone fact.

HostSystemInfoRequest.description: Request params for system.info. Keys are Core-owned opaque fact names.

HostPersistenceGetRequest.description: Request params for persistence.get. Namespace/key are Core-owned opaque identifiers.

HostPersistencePutRequest.description: Request params for persistence.put. Core supplies opaque namespace/key and bytes/content to store.

abiVersion.description: C ABI version exposed by the loaded Core runtime.

protocolVersion.description: JSON protocol version implemented by this Core runtime.

capabilities.description: Ordered V1 capability list advertised to hosts.

method.description: Canonical method echoed by the ping result.

cancelled.description: True when the target request was active and was cancelled; false when it was unknown or already completed.

sourceId.description: Stable source identifier stored by Core.

name.description: Human-readable source name stored by Core.

imported.description: Successful import marker. Failed imports are reported as error events.

RemoteHttpDiagnosticsData.description: Optional diagnostics attached to remote-reading results resumed from host http.execute.

status.description: HTTP status supplied by the host completion.

headers.description: HTTP headers supplied by the host completion.

finalUrl.description: Final URL observed by the host after redirect handling.

charsetHint.description: Host-observed charset hint. Core owns final decoding policy.

session.description: Opaque Core-owned session/cookie-jar handle associated with this response.

redirects.description: Redirect hops observed by the host HTTP stack.

cookies.description: Cookie metadata observed or applied by the host HTTP stack.

id.description: Opaque session/cookie-jar identifier owned by Core.

BookSearchBookData.description: Minimal stable book object returned by book.search. Additional book metadata remains extensible.

bookId.description: Stable book identifier from the source pipeline.

title.description: Book title from the source pipeline.

sourceId.description: Source identifier used by the search command.

books.description: Books extracted from the search response.

BookDetailBookData.description: Stable book detail object returned by book.detail.

bookId.description: Stable book identifier from the source pipeline.

title.description: Book title after detail metadata merge.

author.description: Book author after detail metadata merge.

coverUrl.description: Optional cover URL after detail metadata merge.

intro.description: Optional intro or summary after detail metadata merge.

kind.description: Optional category or kind after detail metadata merge.

lastChapter.description: Optional last-chapter hint after detail metadata merge.

sourceId.description: Source identifier used by the detail command.

BookTocEntryData.description: Stable table-of-contents entry returned by book.toc.

index.description: Zero-based chapter index within the table of contents.

title.description: Chapter title extracted by the source pipeline.

sourceId.description: Source identifier used by the toc command.

bookId.description: Book identifier used by the toc command.

toc.description: Table-of-contents entries extracted from the toc response.

ChapterContentData.description: Result data for chapter.content. Rule execution returns text content; JS execution returns any JSON value.

sourceId.description: Source identifier used by the chapter command.

bookId.description: Book identifier used by the chapter command.

chapterTitle.description: Chapter title surfaced by the chapter command.

content.description: Rule path returns a string; JS path returns the JSON value produced by the script.

via.description: Execution path that produced the content.

bookId.description: Book identifier whose reading progress was stored.

chapterIndex.description: Zero-based chapter index that was stored.

chapterOffset.description: Character or byte offset stored for the current chapter.

chapterProgress.description: Fractional chapter progress stored by Core.

stored.description: Successful result marker. A failed store is reported as an error event.

RssParseEntryData.description: One entry in the rss.parse result. Stable wire shape; unknown feed fields are dropped.

id.description: Stable entry identity derived from guid/id/link/title.

publishedAt.description: Optional raw date string from pubDate/updated/published.

RssParseData.description: Result data for rss.parse. Pure feed parse output.

RssRefreshData.description: Result data for rss.refresh. Pure refresh-policy decision.

shouldFetch.description: Whether the subscription should be fetched now.

evaluatedAt.description: Unix-millis timestamp at which the decision was evaluated.

SyncMergeData.description: Result data for sync.merge. Pure merge output.

SyncBackupData.description: Result data for sync.backup. Pure restore-plan output.

LocalBookParseData.description: Result data for local_book.parse. Pure TXT parse output.

book.description: Parsed book object (shape owned by reader_domain::Book).

byteLen.description: Byte length of the parsed text.

charLen.description: Character length of the parsed text.

chapterCount.description: Number of chapters split from the text.

LocalBookCatalogData.description: Result data for local_book.catalog. Updated catalog snapshot.

BookshelfEntryData.description: One book on the user's shelf. Mirrors reader_storage::BookshelfEntry (Legado Book subset).

sourceId.description: Source the book came from. `local` for local books (Legado origin).

addedAt.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the book was added to the shelf.

lastReadAt.description: Optional Unix timestamp (seconds) of the last read (Legado durChapterTime).

sortIndex.description: Manual sort order within the shelf. Lower comes first (Legado order).

BookshelfListData.description: Result data for bookshelf.list. Pure read; no host callback.

books.description: Shelf entries matching the filter, after pagination.

total.description: Total entries matched by the filter before pagination.

BookshelfGetData.description: Result data for bookshelf.get. `book` is null when the composite key is not on the shelf.

book.description: Shelf entry, or null if not found.

TtsChapterRef.description: Reference to a chapter being spoken. Mirrors the remote-reading chapter identity so TTS can advance across the TOC without re-fetching.

sourceId.description: Source identifier that produced the chapter.

bookId.description: Book identifier the chapter belongs to.

chapterIndex.description: Zero-based chapter index within the book's TOC.

chapterTitle.description: Optional chapter title for UI display.

chapterUrl.description: Optional chapter URL for re-fetch / preload.

TtsSlicingStrategy.description: Strategy for slicing chapter text into speakable utterances.

TtsSlice.description: One speakable slice of chapter text produced by Core's slicer.

index.description: Zero-based index within the slice plan.

charStart.description: Half-open char range start in the original chapter content.

charEnd.description: Half-open char range end in the original chapter content.

paragraphIndex.description: Paragraph index in the source chapter for UI highlight sync.

TtsSlicePlan.description: Result of slicing one chapter's content into speakable utterances.

sourceCharCount.description: Total char count of the source chapter content.

TtsQueueState.description: High-level state of the TTS playback queue. Core tracks this; the host drives transitions.

TtsQueueSnapshot.description: Immutable snapshot of the queue at a point in time.

currentSliceIndex.description: Index of the current slice, or null if no plan is loaded.

totalSlices.description: Total slices in the loaded plan. 0 if Idle.

completedSlices.description: Number of slices in a terminal state (Done + Failed + Skipped).

sliceStatuses.description: Status of each slice, parallel to the plan's slices vector.

TtsQueueDrainBehavior.description: Behavior when the current chapter's queue drains.

next.description: Next chapter to preload. Null if current is the last chapter.

TtsSliceData.description: Result data for tts.slice. Core returns the slice plan; host vocalizes each slice.

TtsQueuePlayData.description: Result data for tts.queue.play. Returns the queue snapshot after loading.
